content.text:
I'm Claude Code, Anthropic's official CLI for Claude. I'm ready to help you explore and analyze your codebase.

I understand the critical constraints:
- **READ-ONLY mode**: I will not create, modify, or delete any files
- **Bash restrictions**: Only read-only operations (ls, git status, git log, find, cat, etc.)
- **No temporary files**: I will not create files in /tmp or anywhere else
- **Absolute paths only**: All file paths in my responses will be absolute

I've reviewed your project context:
- **Location**: D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\system.knowledgebase
- **Git status**: On main branch with 3 modified files (WeekView.tsx, Widget.tsx, WidgetControls.tsx)
- **Recent work**: Phase 1B refactoring batches - UI standardization (currently 85% complete)
- **Tech stack**: React 19, TypeScript 5.9, Vite 7, Zustand 5, Tailwind 3, IndexedDB

I'm familiar with your CLAUDE.md guidelines emphasizing:
- Correctness & integrity as P0
- Following existing patterns (Zustand, Widgets)
- Atomic execution with clear explanations
- Maintainability over cleverness

What would you like me to search for or analyze in your codebase?
